priority_2_2024_holes.note: Updated: includes 2023 gaps (1,346 missing) since DB starts from 2023, not 2024

api_fetch_gaps.description: Transcripts that exist in the earningscall API calendar but were NOT returned during P2 backfill (2023-01-05 to 2025-09-30). The API simply did not return data for these conference dates despite the backfill fetching the correct date. These need targeted retry after backfill completes.

transcripts.note: No Redis meta key exists. API did not return this transcript for 2024-05-02. Q1 (Feb 1) and Q3 (Aug 1) both fetched successfully.
Successfully fetched and in Redis withreturns queue. Waiting for Neo4j writer to reach its FIFO position.

api_fetch_gaps.remediation: After P2 backfill completes, run targeted single-date fetch for missing transcripts: get_transcripts_for_single_date(date(2024, 5, 2)) for AAPL Q2 FY2024. If API still doesn't return it, the transcript may not exist in earningscall's database.

p1_validation_failures.description: Transcripts that were fetched from earningscall API during P1 backfill (2025-10-01 to 2026-03-03) but failed Pydantic validation on the speakers field. The speakers dict has None as a value for title where Pydantic expects a string. These can be re-ingested after fixing the UnifiedTranscript model to accept Optional[str] for speaker titles.
p1_validation_failures.root_cause: speakers dict contains None values for speaker titles (e.g. Operator, Conference Operator, Unknown Participant have title=None). Pydantic UnifiedTranscript model requires str, not Optional[str].

transcripts.error: speakers.Operator title = None + speakers.Dave Smith title = None
speakers.Automated On-Hold Announcement title = None + 1 more
speakers.Jeremy title = None + speakers.Chris Chase title = None
speakers.Operator title = None + 4 more field errors
